pricing.title: Simple Plans for Every Need

Get to know the app, see for yourself – no commitment!

Compare changes over time and track improvement

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Skinly's AI-powered skin analysis.

questions.question: How accurate is AI skin analysis?
questions.answer: Our AI-powered skin analysis works with advanced algorithms trained on thousands of dermatologist-approved skin images. It analyzes with over 90% accuracy for common issues like acne, wrinkles, dark spots, and skin type.

questions.question: Are my skin data and photos secure?
questions.answer: Absolutely. All your skin data and photos are stored and processed securely with enterprise-level encryption. You can delete your data at any time. Our app fully complies with all relevant privacy regulations, including GDPR and other applicable data protection laws.

questions.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time, and no cancellation fee is charged. For paid subscriptions, your access continues until the end of the billing period.

questions.question: Do you offer personalized product recommendations?
questions.answer: Yes! Based on skin analysis, our AI recommends the most suitable ingredients considering your skin type, current skin problems, and routine habits. Thanks to our content-based, not brand-focused system, you can easily discover the ingredients you really need.

questions.question: How often should I take skin analysis photos?
questions.answer: It's enough to take your skin analysis photos once a week. The app will gently remind you every week, and with this regular tracking, you can observe changes in your skin in a healthy way.

questions.question: What's included in the free plan?
questions.answer: Trying our app is completely free. After signing up, you can use all basic features and perform 1 skin analysis.

questions.question: Can I use Skinly if I have sensitive skin?
questions.answer: Skinly is designed for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Our recommendations specifically consider sensitivity levels and offer gentle, hypoallergenic products. It also helps you avoid ingredients that could cause irritation.

faq.supportDescription: Our support team is here to help you get the most out of Skinly.

cta.title: What are you waiting for? Start tracking your skincare routine now!

footer.tagline: Discover your skin's needs with AI.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: This Privacy Policy contains the principles regarding how personal data collected from users of the Skinly - Skin Analysis Assistant mobile application ("Application") is processed, stored, and protected. Users are deemed to have accepted this Privacy Policy by using the application.

collectedData.title: 2. Collected Data
collectedData.content: The following personal data may be collected from users through the application:
items: Identity Information: Name, surname
Contact Information: Email address
Visual Data: Face photos uploaded by the user
Habit and Preference Information: Skin type, lifestyle-related responses
Usage Data: Navigation and preference information within the application

dataCollection.title: 3. Data Collection Method and Legal Basis
dataCollection.content: Data may be collected through user declarations on the application and automatically during the use of the application.
items: GDPR Art. 6(1)(a) (explicit consent)
GDPR Art. 6(1)(f) (legitimate interest - anonymous usage data)

dataProcessing.title: 4. Data Processing Purposes
dataProcessing.content: Collected data may be processed for the following purposes:
items: Performing face recognition-based skin analysis
Providing personalized products and recommendations
Providing and improving the service
Communicating with the user
Fulfilling legal obligations

dataStorage.title: 5. Data Storage and Protection
dataStorage.content: Personal data belonging to users is stored on secure servers located domestically and/or abroad, with technical and administrative measures taken. Data is stored while the application is used, and is retained for 2 years from the termination of the user's membership. After this period, data is deleted or anonymized. The application administrator decides whether data will be anonymized.

faceData.title: Additional Information Regarding Face Data
faceData.content: Face photos uploaded by the user are processed solely for the purpose of performing AI-powered skin analysis. These images are stored securely in the Supabase infrastructure and retained while the user account is active. If the user deletes their account or requests deletion of their data, these images and related analysis results are permanently deleted. Skinly shares face data only with business partners for service provision. In this context, images are analyzed by Face++ (Megvii), and this third-party service provider does not store face photos in their systems after analysis is completed. Face data is never shared with unauthorized third parties or used for commercial purposes.

thirdParty.title: 6. Sharing Data with Third Parties
thirdParty.content: Data is not shared with third parties and institutions except in the following cases:
items: The user has given explicit consent
With sub-service providers for service provision (cloud hosting, AI processing, etc.)
With authorized public institutions and organizations within the scope of legal obligations

thirdPartyAnalytics.title: 6.1. Third-Party Analytics Tools
thirdPartyAnalytics.content: Some third-party analytics tools are used in our application to improve user experience, measure application performance, and detect technical errors. In this context, services such as PostHog and Meta App Events (Facebook Analytics) may process anonymous usage data. These tools may collect technical information such as in-app behaviors, navigation data, specific button clicks, and subscription-related interactions.
thirdPartyAnalytics.content2: This data does not contain your personal identification information and is not used for advertising targeting. All collected anonymous data is processed solely for application development and performance analysis.

dataTransfer.title: 7. Data Transfer Abroad
dataTransfer.content: Personal data is transferred abroad within the scope of the application. This transfer is notified to the user together with the User Agreement, Disclosure Text, and Consent Form, and is carried out with explicit consent.

minors.title: 8. Users Under 18
minors.content: The application is closed to use by individuals under 18 years of age. Data belonging to users found to belong to this age group is immediately deleted.

userRights.title: 9. User Rights
userRights.content: In accordance with GDPR Art. 15, users have the right to:
items: Learn whether data is processed
Request information if data is processed
Learn whether it is used in accordance with the purpose
Request correction of incomplete or incorrectly processed data
Request deletion/anonymization of data in accordance with GDPR Art. 17
Request notification to third parties to whom data has been transferred
Object to a result that is unfavorable to them as a result of analysis by automated systems
Request compensation in case of damage

applicationMethod.title: 10. Application Method
applicationMethod.content: Users can apply via info@skinly.com.tr to exercise these rights. All requests are answered within legal periods.

changes.title: 11. Changes and Updates
changes.content: This Privacy Policy may be updated by the application administrator when necessary. The most current version is published within the application and/or through the website.

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Get to Know Your Skin Better
about.description: Skinly is an AI-powered skin analysis application that aims to help everyone get to know their skin better by basing skin care on scientific data and technological analysis.

scientificApproach.title: Scientific Approach
scientificApproach.content: Unlike the memorized recommendations in the beauty industry, we try to understand the real needs of the skin by going beneath the surface. Our advanced AI infrastructure works with algorithms trained on thousands of dermatologist-approved images and provides personalized analyses for users.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: As Skinly, we believe that skin care should be accessible, reliable, and personalized for everyone. We are here to help you reach the best version of your skin by combining technology with aesthetics and common sense.

accessible.title: Accessible
accessible.description: Accessible skin care solutions for everyone

personalized.title: Personalized
personalized.description: Personalized skin care recommendations for you

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Would you like to get in touch with us?
contact.description: The Skinly team is happy to help you.
contact.content: You can reach us anytime for questions about the app, feedback, or collaboration requests.
contact.responseNote: We make sure to respond to all your messages as soon as possible.
contact.supportText: Would you like to contact our support team directly?

deleteAccount.title: Skinly Account Deletion Instructions
deleteAccount.intro: In the Skinly application, you can permanently delete your account and remove all your data. This action cannot be undone. You can find the steps below.
deleteAccount.stepsIntro: To delete your account, please follow the steps below:
steps: Tap the profile icon in the top right
deleteAccount.stepsNote: After the process is completed, your data will be deleted from the system within 7 days.
deleteAccount.deletedDataIntro: When your account is deleted, the following data will be permanently deleted:
deleteAccount.deletedDataNote: Note: Subscription information (payment history, etc.) may be stored anonymously in our system due to legal obligations.
deleteAccount.processingContent: The deletion process starts immediately and is permanently completed within 7 days. During this period, if you do not reactivate your account, the data cannot be recovered.
deleteAccount.contactContent: If you encounter any issues, you can contact us at:

contactUs.title: Still have questions?
contactUs.description: Our support team is here to help you get the most out of Skinly.
contactUs.errorMessage: Your message could not be sent. Please try again later.
contactUs.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully! We will get back to you as soon as possible.
